var advancedExpanded / groupExpanded declared mid-Column vs other dialog state hoisted at top — style only.

OpenSSL-3+ AES guidance) surface again; dialogHasCertError still gates Save/Test. Subject/size omission by-spec (R1 ④). No transport/ESP trust-path changes. No new blockers.
